solutions.solution: Judge: "Well, we have thirty witnesses who saw you steal the automobile." Prisoner: "Sir, ..." I. I can give you sixty witnesses who did not see me stealing it. II. may be all of them are liars.

Wife: The cleaning woman seems to have stolen two of our new towels. Husband: Which towels? Wife: .......... I. "The ones we had been gifted on our anniversary." II. "The ones we brought back from the hotel in Bombay."

A hunter was telling of his adventures : "Once I was taking a nap in a jungle and suddenly I felt a lion's breath on the back of my neck." So, ...... I. I turned back and requested the lion not to disturb me". II. I turned up my collar".

The father was vexed with his son's careless attitude towards life. So he said; "Monty, you ought to mend your ways. If I died suddenly, what would you be?" The son replied: "......" I. Here. The question is, where will you be? II. Oh, come on, dad; you are not going to die so soon.

"Excuse me, but I'm in a hurry. You have been holding that phone for twenty minutes and not said a word." said the woman. The man replied, ..... I. "I am talking to my wife, madam." II. "That is because I am in no hurry, madam."
I've been feeding my dog garlic. Now, .... I. his bark is worse than his bite. II. he may be needing onions, maybe.

A quack was selling an elixir which he said was the reason why he was hale and hearty despite being 300 years old! A man passing by stopped and asked his assistant: "Is he really as old as that?" The assistant replied: "I don't know. ...." I. I have been working with him for the last 100 years only." II. Even Lord Clive had taken him to be a cheat."
Son: "The doctor is here, Professor." Professor: "I don't want to see him. ......" I. Tell him I'm ill. II. Tell him I'm alright.
A doctor warned his patient: "You must stop smoking, otherwise you might ....." I. not live to my couch. II. not be able to pay my bills.

Patient: "I have a pain in my right leg." The doctor examined the leg carefully and declared : "It's nothing. Just because of old age.." Patient: ......... I. "Then cure me of old age, doctor!" II. Strange! So far as I know both legs are of the same age."

The psychiatrist was assuring the husband; "Don't worry about your wife. You'll have a different woman when she gets back from hospital." Husband: ......... I. And what if she finds out?" II. "And what if my wife finds out."
Boarder: "When I left my last boarding-house, the landlady actually wept." Landlady: "Well, I shan't ......... I. I always collect payment in advance." II. I am a woman with rough interiors."

The errant son reported to his father: "Dad, the car has developed some trouble. There is water in its carburettor." When the father asked how it happened, he replied: "........" I. Oh, I was checking the carburettor when, suddenly, it began to rain. II. Oh, I was driving the car when the bridge collapsed suddenly and fell into the river.

The electrician came to repair the socket. He asked: "Does the bulb work when this plug is switched on?" The houseowner replied: ............ I. "I don't know, I do not have a bulb." II. "I can't say. I do not have a plug."

A asked his friend B how the latter had amassed so much wealth in such a short time. B said: "I joined hands with a rich man. He had the money and I had the experience." He added: ....... I. "Now he has the experience and I the money." II. "When experience joins money, it creates miracles."
A asked B: "Have you forgotten that you owe me five hundred rupees?" B replied: ........... I. "No, I tried but I still remember it." II. "Yes, I have."
